name: social-agent
description: Reddit -> OpenAI -> LinkedIn + Threads + X + Instagram + Facebook autoposter with DALL-E images and web dashboard.

scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run smoke:dist && node dist/test/security-hardening.test.js
scripts.fetch: TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp tsx src/cli.ts fetch
scripts.queue: TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp tsx src/cli.ts queue
scripts.status: TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp tsx src/cli.ts status
scripts.memory: TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp tsx src/cli.ts memory
scripts.history: TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp tsx src/cli.ts history
scripts.post-now: TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp tsx src/cli.ts post-now
scripts.import-x-oauth2: TMPDIR=/tmp TEMP=/tmp TMP=/tmp tsx src/cli.ts import-x-oauth2
